validation_evidence.detail: Error state configured via $theme-color-error: "red-60v" (#dc3545). Dark variant: red-70v, lighter: red-10. Token values confirmed in compiled output. Manual visual verification required in a browser environment.
Success state configured via $theme-color-success: "mint-cool-30v" (#1dc2ae, Intelligent Jade). Dark variant: mint-cool-40v, lighter: mint-cool-5. Compiled output confirms token resolution.

Focus color configured via $theme-link-color: "blue-30v" (#58b4ff). Note: $theme-focus-color is not a valid USWDS v3 settings variable. Focus indicators are derived from theme-link-color and USWDS defaults. Manual visual verification required.

PathAble Blue ($theme-color-primary: "blue-warm-80v" → #162e51) is already a very dark color. USWDS darkens to blue-warm-90 (#13171f) for hover, which is near-black. This is acceptable as USWDS built-in color calculation. An explicit hover override can be added if visual review finds it too dark.

PathAble Blue (#162e51) on Shilling Silver (#dfe1e2): contrast ratio > 10:1 (WCAG AA passes). White (#ffffff) on PathAble Blue (#162e51): contrast ratio > 10:1 (WCAG AA passes). USWDS gray-scale tokens are designed for accessible contrast.
